name: t1021_ssh_keys
query_text: SELECT uid, path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.ssh/%' LIMIT 50;

name: t1021_net_conn
query_text: SELECT pid, local_address, local_port, remote_address, remote_port, state FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port IN (22, 135, 139, 445, 3389, 5985, 5986) AND state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;
